models.description: Covariant relativistic Boltzmann/Juttner-like exponential integrated over eta acceptance.
Bose-Einstein denominator integrated over eta acceptance using the same kinematic scaffold.
Tsallis/Tsallis-Pareto-like eta-integrated spectrum with q and T per component.
Schnedermann-Sollfrank-Heinz blast-wave radial integral at mid-rapidity.
